## Commit messages

- Always use the Conventional Commits format for any commit you create:
  - `type(scope): description`
  - Examples:
    - `fix(tuner): stabilize low-frequency detection`
    - `docs(readme): clarify offline behavior`
- Allowed `type` values in this repository are:
  - `feat`, `fix`, `docs`, `style`, `refactor`, `perf`, `test`, `build`, `ci`, `chore`, `revert`
- Keep the description concise, imperative, and lowercase.
